channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — March 17, 2026
item.description: European nations reject a US call for military involvement in the Strait of Hormuz. Germany faces widespread strikes, leading to the complete halt of flights at Berlin Brandenburg Airport. And Cuba experiences a nationwide power outage.

item.title: The VENCAst — March 16, 2026
item.description: Good morning. Escalating conflict in the Middle East has prompted an emergency release of global oil reserves, while Ukraine continues its urgent financial appeals to the IMF and EU. In European politics, Hungary prepares for April elections with mas...

item.title: The VENCAst — March 15, 2026
item.description: Good morning. US-Iran tensions intensify with strikes on oil infrastructure, raising concerns over global shipping lanes. In Europe, the EU extends sanctions against Russia as Ukraine faces renewed attacks. And in Germany, the intellectual world mour...
